title: mt155 parallel EOD/Rollover fleet
notes: Tag mt155-pre-fleet is the scrap/reset point.
Parallel intentional — expect conflicts on eod-xlsx.ts, Rollover.vue, business-day-repo, settings, HomeView.
Per-line loading DB: CUT. Line Items use synthetic line kind=loading for cart-level loadingCharges.

tasks.task:
Silent EOD export to a fixed folder with toast feedback (megathread #155).

## Product
- Default export directory: `~/Documents/VajraExports` (expand `~` / home). Create the directory if missing.
- Filename: `{yyyy-mm-dd_HH-mm-ss}_eod_report.xlsx` using **local wall clock of export**, not Business Day date.
- **No save dialog / no file picker** — write via Electron **main process** when practical (fs), so success/failure is reliable.
- After export: **toast** success (include path or folder name) or failure (short reason).
- Wire Rollover **Export Report** (`data-testid="eod-export"`) to this path. Keep building the multi-sheet workbook via existing ExcelJS builder (`src/shared/eod-xlsx.ts` / `downloadEodReport` refactor as needed).
- Optional: Settings field to override folder later is nice-to-have; **default path is required**. If you add settings, default must match `~/Documents/VajraExports`.

## Out of scope
Approve-gate watermark (sibling task), Home button (sibling), new sheets, per-line loading DB.

## Tests
Unit or smoke: export writes a real `.xlsx` under a temp dir when folder is injected/mocked if home is awkward in CI — prefer injectable export dir for tests. Update eod-export smoke if it still assumes browser download only; Electron main write may need will-download **or** direct path assert.

## Land
Draft PR base main, title `mt155: eod-silent-export — …`, link #155. Expect merge conflicts with sibling EOD PRs — keep diff focused.

Gate **Approve Rollover** on a fresh EOD export after the last ledger mutation (#155).

## Product
- Track a watermark: prefer integer **ledger generation** (or equivalent) on the open Business Day, bumped on every finished txn create/edit/void-successor (and stock transfer / money txns). Export records `last_export_generation` (or timestamp pair) when export **succeeds**.
- **Approve** button (`rollover-approve-open` / confirm flow) enabled only when `last_export_generation === ledger_generation` (export is not stale).
- Info box on Rollover page when blocked: explain that they must Export Report after the latest transactions before approving; export may be repeated after more work.
- Empty day (generation 0 / no txns): decide sensibly — either require one export of the empty book before approve, or allow approve without export when there are zero live txns; **document choice in PR**. Prefer requiring export so the day book file always exists (ADR-0001).
- Drafts: if drafts exist, either invalidate export when drafts change or ignore drafts for watermark — pick one, document.

## Out of scope
Next business day picker, silent folder path details (coordinate with silent-export via shared export function if present on main; otherwise call existing export entry and hook watermark where export succeeds).

## Tests
Unit/repo tests for generation bump + gate. Smoke or unit: export unlocks approve; new txn re-locks.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155. Focused diff.

On Rollover **approve**, let the user choose the **next Business Day** date (#155).

## Product
- Replace hard-coded `date('now')` in `approveRollover` with an explicit next `startDate` (YYYY-MM-DD) from the UI.
- Constraints: `nextStartDate > current open business day startDate` AND `nextStartDate >= calendar today` (local timezone).
- Preselect:
  - If today > current startDate → preselect **today**
  - Else → preselect **next Mon–Sat working day** (skip Sunday). User may still pick any date that satisfies constraints (including Sunday if allowed by constraints only — do not hard-ban Sunday unless constraints already block it).
- UI: date control on Rollover before Approve; show current Business Day label.
- Transaction IDs use the new day's startDate after approve (ADR-0009) — existing ID builder already takes startDate from open day.

## Out of scope
Edit date of empty open day (sibling), export gate, export folder.

## Tests
Unit for preselect helpers and validation; approve path stores chosen date.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155.

Allow changing the **open Business Day startDate** when there are **no finished transactions** (#155).

## Product
- If open day has zero rows in `txn` for that business_day_id, shopkeeper can set a new startDate with same constraints as next-day on rollover: `> previous closed day's startDate` (if any) and `>= today` when that matches product rules — align with sibling next-biz-day rules; if previous closed date is unknown, at least `>= today` or document weaker rule.
- Block change when any finished txn exists (clear error).
- Drafts: if any draft exists, either block date change or allow — **prefer block** with message to clear drafts first.
- UI: modest control on Rollover and/or Home/Settings — keep small; testids for input + save.

## Out of scope
Rewriting txn IDs for days with history, multi-day retention.

## Tests
Repo unit: empty day update OK; with txn rejected.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155.

Add **Line Items** sheet to the EOD XLSX (#155). **No DB migration for per-line loading.**

## Columns (fixed)
Time (date+time of txn), Order Id (display serial / txn id), Line Id, Transaction Type, Party Name, Product, Qty, Bag Size, Rate, Amt, Loading Charges, Total.

## Line kind (required column or clear convention)
- `goods` — normal product lines from txn_line
- `loading` — **one synthetic line per sale** when loading applied / loadingCharges > 0 or loadingApplied: cart-level loading amount (do **not** split across goods lines; do **not** migrate DB)
- `discount` — synthetic for sale discount / settlement discount as appropriate
- `additional` — synthetic for additionalCharges

Order-level fields become their own rows with Product blank or label text; goods rows carry line qty/rate/amt.

Include stock-moving types that have lines (SA/PU/ST as appropriate). Money-only types can be omitted here if sibling money sheet covers them — or include briefly; prefer goods + synthetics for SA/PU/ST.

## Out of scope
Per-line loading in SQLite, money sheet (sibling), export gate.

## Tests
Unit: build workbook, assert Line Items sheet exists, goods + loading synthetic for a fixture sale with loading.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155. Expect conflicts on eod-xlsx.ts.

Add a separate EOD sheet for **non-stock money movements**: Receipts, Payments, Income, Expenses (#155).

## Product
- Sheet name e.g. **Money** or **Non-stock** (English, fixed; pin in tests).
- Rows: live (non-voided) RE, PA, IN, EX only.
- Useful columns: Time, Id/serial, Type, Party/label, Cash in/out, UPI in/out, Discount, Total/remarks as available on Txn.
- Do not put goods cart lines here.

## Out of scope
Line Items sheet (sibling), loading DB changes.

## Tests
Unit: fixture money txns appear; sales do not.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155.

Add **Export Report** as a quick action under Home **Masters & Records** (or equivalent management section) (#155).

## Product
- Same export behaviour as Rollover export (shared function — silent folder + toast if that landed on main; else same path Rollover uses when you branch).
- `data-testid="home-eod-export"` (or similar).
- Do **not** put Approve Rollover on Home.
- Short label e.g. Export Day Report.

## Out of scope
New sheets, date pickers, approve gate UI (gate lives on Rollover).

## Tests
Smoke or component-level: control visible; optional click if export can be mocked.

## Land
Draft PR → main, link #155.
